name: DORA Vendor Contract Checklist
description: Comprehensive checklist for DORA compliance in ICT third-party service provider contracts

questions.question: Does the contract clearly define the ICT services to be provided, including service levels and performance targets?
Does the contract specify the locations where ICT services will be provided and where data will be processed and stored?
Does the contract include provisions regarding the protection of personal data and confidential information?
Does the contract contain audit rights allowing the financial entity to conduct audits and inspections?
Does the contract specify incident management and reporting obligations of the ICT third-party provider?
Does the contract include business continuity arrangements and disaster recovery plans?
Does the contract contain termination clauses and exit strategies, including data portability provisions?
Does the contract address subcontracting arrangements and require prior approval for material subcontracting?
Does the contract ensure the ICT third-party provider cooperates with competent authorities?
Does the contract specify security requirements and measures to protect against ICT-related risks?
Does the contract include notification requirements for material changes to the service?
Does the contract define escalation procedures and contact points for critical incidents?
Does the contract include provisions for regular performance reviews and reporting?
Does the contract address concentration risk and dependency on the ICT third-party provider?
Does the contract include provisions for threat-led penetration testing (TLPT) support if applicable?
